sql: SELECT id, name, email, status, department FROM users WHERE status = #{level1} AND department = #{level2} AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{level3}, '%') ORDER BY ${sortField}
templateSql:
SELECT id, name, email, status, department FROM users
<where>
    <if test="level1 != null">
        <if test="level2 != null">
            <if test="level3 != null">
                AND status = #{level1}
                AND department = #{level2}
                AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{level3}, '%')
            </if>
        </if>
    </if>
</where>
<if test="sortField != null">
    ORDER BY ${sortField}
</if>
